name: BeyondSpring Inc.
business: BeyondSpring Inc. is a clinical stage global biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative therapies to improve clinical outcomes for patients with high unmet medical needs. Its first-in-class lead asset, Plinabulin, is a novel brain-penetrant microtubule modulator with dendritic cell maturation and vasculature modulation mechanism. The company also develops three small molecule immune agents in pre-clinical stages and owns an equity stake in SEED Therapeutics, which uses a targeted protein degradation platform.
sellsTo: patients with high unmet medical needs

exposures.sentence: Our first-in-class lead asset, Plinabulin is a novel brain-penetrant microtubule modulator with dendritic cell maturation and vasculature modulation mechanism, which has the potential to help mitigate acquired resistance from prior immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICI) treatment in cancer patients.
In addition, we founded and continue to own an equity stake in SEED Therapeutics Inc., or SEED.

catalysts.event: Initiation of phase 1 clinical studies for SEED's wholly owned lead oncology asset, a novel RBM39 degrader
catalysts.sentence: SEED has advanced its wholly owned lead oncology asset, a novel RBM39 degrader into phase 1 clinical studies in January 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The global NSCLC market is increasing at a rate of 10% per year, with estimated sales of $26.7 billion and $44.6 billion in 2021 and 2026, respectively.
tamClaims.sentence: The global NSCLC market is increasing at a rate of 10% per year, with estimated sales of $26.7 billion and $44.6 billion in 2021 and 2026, respectively.

tamClaims.claim: The global market size of PD-1 and PD-L1 inhibitors/ immune checkpoint inhibitors was around $60 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $135.55 billion by 2031 at a CAGR of 13.88%.
tamClaims.sentence: The global market size of PD-1 and PD-L1 inhibitors/ immune checkpoint inhibitors was around $60 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $135.55 billion by 2031 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.88% (Mordor Intelligence 2025).

tamClaims.claim: In China, new cases of NSCLC are expected to reach over 1 million by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: In China, between 2015 and 2019, the number of new cases of NSCLC increased from 669,000 to 761,000, and the number of new cases is expected to reach over 1 million by 2030.
